About Our Agency

Shaping Malta's built environment with expertise, integrity, and local pride.

We are a Malta-based agency focused on structural design, architectural design, interior design, and consultation services for residential and light commercial clients.

Founded in 2012, we've built a reputation for combining technical rigor with creative vision. Our team of licensed architects, structural engineers, and interior designers work collaboratively to deliver projects that honor Malta's heritage while embracing modern standards.

Service Area

Malta and Gozo

We serve residential and light commercial clients across the Maltese islands, with deep expertise in local planning requirements and heritage considerations.

Office Location

Mosta, Malta

Centrally located to serve clients across the country. Visit us to discuss your project in person.

14+
Years of Experience

Serving Maltese clients with dedication and expertise

150+
Projects Completed

Across residential, commercial, and heritage sectors

98%
Client Satisfaction

Consistently delivering excellence and transparency

4
Core Specialties

Structural, Architectural, Interior, and Consultation

Our Purpose

Guided by clear principles, we approach every project with intention and care.

Our Mission

To guide Maltese property owners through every stage of design, compliance, and build coordination with clarity and care.

Our Vision

To be the most trusted local partner for homes that are structurally sound, beautifully designed, and practical to live in.

Core Values

These principles guide every decision we make and every project we undertake.

Technical accuracy

We apply rigorous engineering standards and building codes to ensure every structure is safe, durable, and compliant with Maltese regulations.

Local knowledge

Deep understanding of Malta's unique climate, heritage considerations, planning authority requirements, and construction landscape.

Transparent communication

Clear, honest dialogue with clients at every stage. We explain technical decisions in accessible terms and keep you informed throughout your project.

Refined design

Balancing aesthetic beauty with practical functionality. Our designs respect Maltese architectural traditions while embracing contemporary innovation.

Meet Our Team

Experienced professionals dedicated to delivering excellence in every project.

Bryan

Malta Consultant

Lead Architect

Bryan leads concept development and planning submissions for homes, small developments, and heritage-sensitive projects.

Peter

Chartered Engineer

Structural Engineer

Peter focuses on load-bearing reviews, reinforcement strategies, and technical coordination for renovation and extension works.

Sophie

Design Professional

Interior Designer

Sophie develops interior schemes that combine efficient layouts, durable finishes, and a warm Mediterranean feeling.

Interested in learning more about our team's expertise and experience?

Ready to Start Your Project?

Whether you're planning a residential renovation, commercial build, or seeking expert consultation, our team is ready to guide you through every step.

Malta Construction Agency is a premier engineering and architectural agency specialized in preserving construction heritage while building its modern future.
